what: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegBrainnetome
title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegBrainnetome
text: ggseg 2.0 atlas package providing brain atlas data ggseg ecosystem. data-package custom functions.

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegBrainnetome
text: data/*.rda – ggseg_atlas objects (2D polygon geometry) R/brainnetome.R – Roxygen2 documentation atlas R/ggsegBrainnetome-package.R – Package-level docs, imports ggseg.formats R/sysdata.rda – Internal palette data (brain_pals) data-raw/ – Scripts generated/converted atlas data

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegBrainnetome
text: package depends ggseg.formats provides ggseg_atlas class. atlas provides 2D data ggseg::geom_brain() (3D vertex data).

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegBrainnetome
text: Update docs: devtools::document() Run tests: devtools::test() (testthat edition 3, describe/style) Full check: devtools::check() Build pkgdown site: pkgdown::build_site()

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegBrainnetome
text: code comments except necessary workarounds Roxygen2 markdown enabled Tests use describe/BDD style vdiffr visual regression NEWS.md tracks user-facing changes (CI/pkgdown changes) URLs point ggseg GitHub org (LCBC-UiO)

what: Brainnetome Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
title: Brainnetome Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: package contains Brainnetome atlas plotting ggseg. Fan L, Li H, Zhuo J, Zhang Y, Wang J, Chen L, Yang Z, Chu C, Xie S, Laird AR, Fox PT, Eickhoff SB, Yu C, Jiang T (2016). Human Brainnetome Atlas: New Brain Atlas Based Connectional Architecture. Cerebral Cortex, 26(8):3508-3526. doi: 10.1093/cercor/bhw157. learn use atlases, please look documentation ggseg.

title: Brainnetome Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
Brainnetome Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
code: library(ggsegBrainnetome) library(ggseg) library(ggplot2)  ggplot() +   geom_brain(     atlas = brainnetome(),     mapping = aes(fill = label),     position = position_brain(hemi ~ view),     show.legend = FALSE   ) +   scale_fill_manual(values = brainnetome()$palette, na.value = "grey") +   theme_void()

title: Brainnetome Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem

title: Brainnetome Atlas — brainnetome
text: Brain atlas Brainnetome cortical parcellation 105 regions per hemisphere. Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain().

text: Fan L, Li H, Zhuo J, Zhang Y, Wang J, Chen L, Yang Z, Chu C, Xie S, Laird AR, Fox PT, Eickhoff SB, Yu C, Jiang T (2016). Human Brainnetome Atlas: New Brain Atlas Based Connectional Architecture. Cerebral Cortex, 26(8):3508-3526. doi:10.1093/cercor/bhw157

what: ggsegBrainnetome: Brainnetome Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegBrainnetome-package
title: ggsegBrainnetome: Brainnetome Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegBrainnetome-package
text: Brainnetome atlas 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides 'ggseg_atlas' object 2D polygon geometry use 'ggseg'.

title: ggsegBrainnetome: Brainnetome Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegBrainnetome-package
ggsegBrainnetome 2.0.0
text: brainnetome now ggseg_atlas object (ggseg.formats) containing 2D polygon geometry. Atlas recreated scratch using ggsegExtra::create_cortical_atlas() BN_Atlas annotation fsaverage5. Use ggplot() + ggseg::geom_brain(atlas = brainnetome) 2D plots. ggseg.formats now hard dependency (Depends). Package URLs updated LCBC-UiO ggseg GitHub organisation.
